name: Shiranui Spiritmaster
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>不知火</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しらぬい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>宮</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>みや</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>司</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>づかさ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Shiranui" monster from your hand or GY, except "Shiranui Spiritmaster", but banish it when it leaves the field. If this card is banished: You can target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy it. You can only use this effect of "Shiranui Spiritmaster" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Shiranui" monster from your hand or GY, except "Shiranui Spiritmaster", but banish it when it leaves the field. If this card is banished: You can target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy it. You can only use this effect of "Shiranui Spiritmaster" once per turn.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Shiranui" monster from your hand or GY, except "Shiranui Spiritmaster", but banish it when it leaves the field. If this card is banished: You can target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy it. You can only use this effect of "Shiranui Spiritmaster" once per turn.

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Trap Cards
banished: Banishes other cards when they leave the field
